title: Tanacetum dolomiticum
intro: Tanacetum dolomiticum is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the mountains of central Europe. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of headaches, fever, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Tanacetum dolomiticum include flavonoids, sesquiterpenes, and other terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Tanacetum dolomiticum is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, often in combination with other herbs to promote relaxation and relieve stress.
taxonomy: Tanacetum dolomiticum is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a type of daisy-like plant native to the Dolomites region in Italy. properties: Tanacetum dolomiticum, also known as Dolomitic Tansy, has been studied for its potential therapeutic properties.
